remarks.zh: 窗户制造的多行输出示例。根据需要调整偏移。(AI translated, please check)
remarks.en: Example of multi-line output for window fabrication. Adjust offsets as needed.
remarks.ms: Contoh output berbilang baris untuk fabrikasi tingkap. Sesuaikan offset jika perlu. (AI translated, please check)

remarks.tl: Halimbawa ng multi-line na output para sa paggawa ng bintana. Ayusin ang mga offsets kung kinakailangan. (AI translated, please check)
